description: Fix 3 partial stories from Phase 10 verification. Small targeted fixes only — do not touch passing stories.

userStories.title: Fix baseline day count query — replace unbounded SELECT with RPC
userStories.description: As a developer, the distinct-day count query fetches ALL rows with no date bound, which becomes a performance risk as data grows. Replace with a server-side RPC that counts efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Read baseline_calibration.dart and baseline_repository.dart before making changes
Create a Supabase RPC function get_baseline_day_count(user_id uuid) that returns COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(start_time)) for the last 60 days only
baseline_repository.dart updated to call the RPC instead of fetching all rows client-side
Result is identical — returns integer count of distinct days with health data
flutter analyze returns 0 errors

userStories.title: Auto-compute VO2 max forecast when 7+ data points exist
userStories.description: As a user, the VO2 max forecast should appear automatically when enough data exists — I should not have to manually trigger it.
acceptanceCriteria: Read the VO2 max chart file in lib/features/insights/ before making changes
loadData() checks count of VO2 max data points after fetching
If 7 or more data points exist, forecast line is computed and rendered automatically
If fewer than 7 data points exist, chart shows Keep training — more data needed message
Manual trigger button removed if it exists
Chart period corrected to show last 30 days not 21 days
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
Verify on Android device

userStories.title: Tighten baseline gate — hide raw score during calibration
userStories.description: As a user, I should not see a raw recovery score number during the 14-day calibration period as it is based on incomplete data and could be misleading.
acceptanceCriteria: Read recovery_score_dashboard_card.dart and baseline_calibration.dart before making changes
During calibration (baseline_days_count less than 14): dashboard card shows only the Day X of 14 progress bar — no numeric score shown
During calibration: card title shows Calibrating... instead of Recovery Score
After calibration completes: full score with sparkline shown as normal
Calibration progress bar remains visible and accurate throughout
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
Verify on Android device
